estimated_runtime: 1-3 hours for one disk cache and three 100-epoch approximately 3.88M-parameter fits on one A6000; watcher is authoritative
claim_scope: fourth fixed-key PRESENT r3 selected-eight-output exact-P versus identity-P and fixed-wrong-P topology attribution; not r4 evidence, full-ciphertext recovery, broad cross-key statistics, or SOTA
launch_policy: Launch only from an explicit pushed commit in a clean short-path run-owned clone under G:\lxy through cmd.exe /c on physical GPU0; verify the exact OPA2 gate hash; keep cache, progress, checkpoints, logs, results, and archive under G:\lxy; require 24 result rows, 300 history rows, three checkpoints, valid protocol/execution checks, a verified result branch, and local tmux retrieval.
